framework_name: FFIEC IT Examination Handbook — Management booklet

controls.title: Board Oversight of IT
controls.description: The board (or designated committee) understands the institution's IT environment + provides documented oversight of IT strategy, risk, + investment decisions.

controls.title: IT Strategic Plan
controls.description: An IT strategic plan aligned with the institution's business strategy is documented, board-approved, + refreshed at least every 3 years.

controls.title: IT Steering / Governance Committee
controls.description: An IT steering committee (or equivalent) provides ongoing tactical governance: project prioritization, resource allocation, + risk-acceptance decisions.

controls.title: IT Policies + Standards Framework
controls.description: Documented IT policies + standards cover information security, change management, BC/DR, vendor management, + acceptable use, with annual or change-driven review.

controls.title: IT Investment Prioritization
controls.description: IT investments are prioritized via a documented process considering: business value, regulatory requirement, risk reduction, + technical-debt burden.

controls.title: Technology Roadmap
controls.description: A documented technology roadmap shows in-flight + planned initiatives across a 1-3 year horizon, refreshed at least annually.

controls.title: Innovation + Emerging-Tech Posture
controls.description: The institution maintains a documented posture on emerging technologies (AI / ML / cloud / blockchain) including evaluation criteria + risk-tolerance thresholds.

controls.title: IT Organizational Structure
controls.description: IT roles + reporting relationships are documented with clear segregation of duties between development, operations, + security functions.

controls.title: Information Security Officer Independence
controls.description: The CISO / Information Security Officer reports independently of IT operations management to ensure objective security posture decisions.

controls.title: Staffing Levels + Skill Coverage
controls.description: IT staffing levels are sized to support the institution's operations + risk profile; key-person dependencies are documented + mitigated.

controls.title: Background Screening for IT Personnel
controls.description: IT personnel + privileged-access role holders undergo documented pre-employment background screening + periodic re-screening for sensitive roles.

controls.title: Training + Awareness Program
controls.description: All staff receive at-least-annual security awareness training; IT + IS staff receive role-appropriate technical training.

controls.title: Project Management Methodology
controls.description: Material IT projects follow a documented project-management methodology with defined gates: initiation, design, build, test, deploy, post-implementation review.

controls.title: Project Risk Assessment
controls.description: Each material project receives a documented risk assessment covering business, operational, + security dimensions.

controls.title: Change Management Process
controls.description: Production changes follow a documented change-management process: request, risk-assessed approval, scheduled deployment, post-implementation review.

controls.title: Emergency Change Procedures
controls.description: Emergency change procedures (out-of-band production changes) are documented with retrospective approval + post-implementation review requirements.

controls.title: Configuration Management
controls.description: Production system configurations are documented + maintained in a configuration management database (CMDB) or equivalent.

controls.title: Enterprise Risk Management Integration
controls.description: IT risk management integrates with enterprise risk management framework: shared taxonomy, escalation thresholds, reporting cadence.

controls.title: Risk Appetite + Tolerance Statements
controls.description: Documented risk appetite + tolerance statements cover IT risk categories: cybersecurity, operational, third-party, model.

controls.title: Risk Acceptance + Exception Process
controls.description: Risk acceptance decisions follow a documented process with appropriate approval levels + periodic re-evaluation requirements.

controls.title: Service-Level Management
controls.description: IT services have documented service-level objectives + agreements with internal customers + are monitored against them.

controls.title: Capacity + Performance Planning
controls.description: Documented capacity-planning processes monitor system utilization + forecast capacity needs to avoid degradation.

controls.title: Performance Reporting to Management
controls.description: IT performance metrics (uptime, MTTR, project delivery, incidents) are reported to management on a documented cadence.

controls.title: Coordination with Internal Audit
controls.description: IT management coordinates with internal audit to support audit coverage + ensure timely remediation of findings.

controls.title: Self-Assessment + Continuous-Improvement
controls.description: IT functions perform documented self-assessments to identify control gaps + opportunities for process improvement.

controls.title: Regulatory Examination Readiness
controls.description: IT management maintains documentation, control evidence, + personnel availability for regulatory examination on demand.
